plan: Replaced the traffic light color divs with semantic button controls that have accessible names, focus styling, type="button", and aria-pressed state. Added a focused React Testing Library regression test for tab focus plus Enter/Space activation of the red, orange, and green lights. Focused Vitest could not run because Vite config loading failed before tests with esbuild `spawn EPERM`; TypeScript validation also fails on existing unrelated errors outside trafficLight.
